WHEN DRIVING THIS 2019 KICKS S. THE TRANSMISSION WILL RUMBLE ON TURNS OR STARTING TO TAKE OFF. THE TRANSMISSION ALSO HAS A HARD TIME CHANGING GEARS WHEN U GET TO THE 3RD GEAR GOING ABOUT 35 - 40 MPH. THESE NEW TRANSMISSIONS THAT NISSAN IS USING REALLY NEED TO B RECALLED TO FIX TH

narrative.headline: What 2019 Nissan Kicks owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 130 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (31% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
